## Risk Statement

## Severity

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High

## Likelihood

- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Mitigation

## Owner

## Trigger / Early Warning Signal

<!-- What would tell us this risk is materializing? -->

## Status

- [ ] Active — being mitigated
- [ ] Watching — not yet acting, monitoring trigger
- [ ] Realized — now an incident, link to incident issue
- [ ] Closed — risk no longer applies (explain)
